mapper.sql: id, family_user_id, task_id, volunteer_id, feedback_type, title, content, rating, status, response, responded_by, responded_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT f.*, u.full_name as volunteer_name, t.title as task_title FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.volunteer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.id WHERE f.family_user_id = #{familyUserId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT f.*, u.full_name as volunteer_name, t.title as task_title FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.volunteer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.id WHERE f.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND status = 'PENDING'

SELECT f.*, u.full_name as volunteer_name, t.title as task_title FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.volunteer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.id ORDER BY CASE f.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'PROCESSING' THEN 2 WHEN 'RESOLVED' THEN 3 END, f.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE status = #{status}
